name: fixit-platform
description: Full-stack debugging platform for technical events

scripts.setup: npm run setup:backend && npm run setup:frontend
scripts.lan:setup: npm run setup:backend && npm run setup:frontend && cd frontend && npm run build
scripts.lan:deploy: npm run lan:setup && npm run lan:start
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend

author: FixIt Team
